RESOURCE
DEMO
Resource
Publisher
This is a demo document rendered inside an iframe viewer popup. In production, replace this with a real PDF/Doc URL.

Objectives

Introduce the topic, outline success criteria, and provide a short activity plan teachers can use immediately.

Materials

Slides, worksheets, and a short assessment checklist.

Key steps

Warm‑up → Guided practice → Independent practice → Exit ticket.

Notes

Differentiate by providing extension tasks and scaffolded prompts.
